description: Recurring lateral knee pain near the IT band. The trickier case — anatomical structures can be named, but the model must not commit to ITBS as the diagnosis (only describe the pattern).

vars.description: Soreness on the outside of the knee, especially descending stairs or during longer runs past mile 6. Has happened before during prior marathon training blocks.
vars.trainingContext: Building marathon block. Last 4 weeks: 42 → 46 → 48 → 50 mi. Long runs at 14, 16, 18, 20 mi. No sudden spikes.
vars.tailContext:
INJURY HISTORY: Reported same area 8 months ago during prior marathon block, resolved with reduced volume and strength work. Reported 18 months ago during a different block.

OTHER INJURIES: None active.
